- **žĚīž§Ď SOT ŪėľŽŹô ž†úÍĪį** ‚ÄĒ pre-v0.50.0 žčúž†ąžĚė `auth.json`žĚī v0.50.0 `auth.toml` ŽŹĄžěÖ ŪõĄžóźŽŹĄ žěĒž°īŪēīžĄú `/login` dashboardÍįÄ ŽĎź ŪĆĆžĚľžĚĄ ŽŹôžčúžóź žįłž°įŪēėŽćė ŽĮłžĄł Ž≤ĄÍ∑łÍįÄ ŪēīžÜĆŽź©ŽčąŽč§. Ūēú Ž≤ą ŽßąžĚīÍ∑łŽ†ąžĚīžÖė ŪõĄ `auth.toml`ŽßĆ SOTŽ°ú žā¨žö©.

## [0.50.1] ‚ÄĒ 2026-04-25

### Added
- **`manage_login` agentic tool** ‚ÄĒ natural-language access to the unified `/login` command. Supports the same subcommands as the slash command (`status`, `add`, `oauth`, `set-key`, `use`, `route`, `remove`, `quota`, `help`). Returns a structured snapshot (plans, profiles, routing) so the LLM can reason about credential state without re-rendering the Rich dashboard. (`core/tools/definitions.json`, `core/cli/tool_handlers.py`)
- **Safety/policy registration** ‚ÄĒ `manage_login` is in `WRITE_TOOLS`, blocked for sub-agents (`SUBAGENT_DENIED_TOOLS`), excluded from auto-recovery (`error_recovery._EXCLUDED_TOOLS`), denied for read-only profiles, and emits an HITL approval card with `subcommand`/`args` summary. (`core/agent/safety_constants.py`, `core/agent/sub_agent.py`, `core/agent/error_recovery.py`, `core/tools/policy.py`, `core/agent/approval.py`)

### Changed
- **`set_api_key` and `manage_auth` tool descriptions** ‚ÄĒ both now point users (and the model) at `manage_login` as the preferred path. Approval denial messages updated to reference `/login` instead of the legacy `/key` and `/auth` commands.

## [0.50.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-04-25

### Added
- **Plan + ProviderSpec credential model** ‚ÄĒ first-class `Plan` entity with `PlanKind` (PAYG / SUBSCRIPTION / OAUTH_BORROWED / CLOUD_PROVIDER), per-Plan endpoint binding, and optional `Quota(window_s, max_calls, model_weights)`. Built-in templates for GLM Coding Lite/Pro/Max. (`core/gateway/auth/plans.py`, `core/llm/registry.py`)
- **`/login` unified credentials command** ‚ÄĒ replaces split `/key` + `/auth` + `/login` UX with a single dashboard + verb hierarchy modeled on Hermes (`hermes auth ...`) and Claude Code (`/login` / `/status`). Subcommands: `add` (interactive wizard), `oauth openai`, `set-key`, `use`, `route`, `remove`, `quota`, `status`. The bare `/login` shows a unified view of Plans + Profiles + Routing + OAuth credentials. (`core/cli/commands.py`)
- **`~/.geode/auth.toml` persistence** ‚ÄĒ Plans and bound profiles survive process restarts in a single TOML file (0600 perms). First boot auto-migrates `.env` PAYG keys into PAYG plans. `GEODE_AUTH_TOML` env var redirects the path for testing/sandboxing. (`core/gateway/auth/auth_toml.py`)
- **Mascot plan line** ‚ÄĒ startup brand block shows the active subscription quota: `Plan: GLM Coding Lite (used 23/80 ¬∑ 57 left ¬∑ resets 134m)`. Hidden when no quota-bearing plan is registered. (`core/cli/ui/mascot.py`)
- **`AuthError` + `ERROR_HINTS`** ‚ÄĒ structured auth errors map to user-actionable hints (subscription upgrade URLs, `/login set-key` invocations, OAuth refresh prompts). Hermes `format_auth_error` pattern. (`core/gateway/auth/errors.py`)
- **Model-switch reason in IPC events** ‚ÄĒ `MODEL_SWITCHED` events now surface the trigger (`rate_limit`, `auth_cross_provider`, `failure_escalation`) inline so users can tell quota exhaustion apart from auth errors at a glance. (`core/cli/ui/event_renderer.py`)

### Fixed
- **Anthropic sampling parameters on adaptive-thinking models** ‚ÄĒ `claude-opus-4-7`, `claude-opus-4-6`, `claude-sonnet-4-6` rejected requests with `temperature` set ("temperature is deprecated for this model" ‚Üí 400 BadRequest). Sampling parameters are now omitted on adaptive-thinking models per Anthropic's Opus 4.7 breaking change. `claude-opus-4-7` also registered for the context-management + compaction beta. Fixes the `/model` hot-swap to Opus 4.7. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/models/whats-new-claude-4-7
- **Codex OAuth poisoning general OpenAI calls** ‚ÄĒ Codex CLI OAuth was registered as `provider="openai"`, so `ProfileRotator.resolve("openai")` returned the Codex token for every GPT call. Codex tokens lack `model.request` scope on `api.openai.com`, causing 403 + slow API-key fallback. The provider variant is now `openai-codex` with its own endpoint (`chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex`). (`core/runtime_wiring/infra.py`, `core/llm/providers/codex.py`)
- **GLM Coding Plan endpoint** ‚ÄĒ `GLM_BASE_URL` pointed at the metered PAYG endpoint (`api.z.ai/api/paas/v4`), so Coding Plan keys silently bypassed the subscription quota. Default flipped to `api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4`; PAYG endpoint preserved as `GLM_PAYG_BASE_URL`. (`core/config.py`, `core/llm/providers/glm.py`)
- **Dual ProfileStore drift** ‚ÄĒ CLI (`/auth`) and runtime LLM dispatch held separate `ProfileStore` instances. Credentials added through `/auth add` were invisible to `ProfileRotator.resolve()`. Single singleton via `runtime_wiring.infra.ensure_profile_store()`. (`core/runtime_wiring/infra.py`, `core/cli/commands.py`)
- **Provider label fragmentation (`zhipuai` vs `glm`)** ‚ÄĒ UI store used `provider="zhipuai"` while dispatch keyed off `provider="glm"`. Profile rotator could never find UI-added GLM keys. Normalized to `glm`. (`core/cli/commands.py`)
- **`MODEL_PROFILES` mislabel** ‚ÄĒ `gpt-5.4-mini` was advertised as `Codex (Plus)` even though it routes to plain `openai` (PAYG). Users believed they were on the Plus subscription while being billed metered. Now labeled `OpenAI`. (`core/cli/commands.py`)

### Changed
- **Cross-provider auto-escalation disabled for `glm` and `openai-codex`** ‚ÄĒ `CROSS_PROVIDER_FALLBACK["glm"]` and `["openai-codex"]` are now empty. A GLM Coding Plan auth error no longer silently diverts traffic to a metered OpenAI key. Cross-plan jumps will return as an explicit user-confirmed action in a future release. (`core/llm/adapters.py`)
- **`/key` and `/auth` are aliases that surface the unified `/login` dashboard** ‚ÄĒ bare `/key` redirects to `/login`. Setting an API key still works (`/key sk-...`) and now also seeds a PAYG plan into the registry so the credential is visible in `/login`.

### Architecture
- **Provider variant registry** ‚ÄĒ `core/llm/registry.py` introduces `ProviderSpec(id, display_name, default_base_url, auth_type, extra_headers_factory)` modeled on Hermes' `ProviderConfig`. Five variants registered: `anthropic`, `openai`, `openai-codex`, `glm`, `glm-coding`. The Codex variant carries the Cloudflare-bypass header factory.
- **`AuthProfile.plan_id`** ‚ÄĒ additive FK linking a profile to a Plan. `base_url_override` allows per-profile endpoint overrides (China-mainland mirrors etc.). Backward compatible ‚ÄĒ env-loaded profiles default to a synthetic PAYG Plan.

## [0.49.1] ‚ÄĒ 2026-04-23

### Infrastructure
- Added repo hygiene ratchet ‚ÄĒ CI blocks PRs introducing dangling symlinks, absolute-path symlinks, or orphan `.claude/worktrees/` entries missing `.owner` metadata (`scripts/check_repo_hygiene.py`, wired into the `lint` job).
- Removed stale tracked `.owner` at repo root (accidentally committed via 6d07637) and added `/.owner` to `.gitignore` so the worktree ownership convention in CLAUDE.md ¬ß0 no longer pollutes feature branches.

## [0.49.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-04-23

### Architecture
- **Approval workflow extraction** ‚ÄĒ HITL approval logic extracted from `tool_executor.py` to `agent/approval.py`. SRP improvement (#750)
- **Hook interceptor/feedback pattern** ‚ÄĒ TOOL_EXEC hooks upgraded to interceptor pattern with aggressive recovery wiring (#751)
- **Adapter base classes** ‚ÄĒ `BaseNotificationAdapter` (Slack/Discord/Telegram), `BaseCalendarAdapter` (Google/Apple), `BasePoller` infra consolidation. ~200ž§Ą ž§ĎŽ≥Ķ ž†úÍĪį (#731)
- **OAuth credential cache** ‚ÄĒ `CredentialCache` class extracts shared TTL+mtime cache pattern from 2 OAuth readers (#731)
- **Provider key resolution** ‚ÄĒ `resolve_provider_key()` centralizes ProfileRotator lookup (#731)
- **Scoring constants** ‚ÄĒ `scoring_constants.py` single source of truth for tier thresholds, weights, confidence multiplier (#731)

### Added
- **Tool hook matcher** ‚ÄĒ `register(matcher="run_bash|terminal")` regex ŪĆ®ŪĄīžúľŽ°ú ŪēłŽď§Žü¨ÍįÄ ŪäĻž†ē ŽŹĄÍĶ¨žóźŽßĆ ŽįėžĚĎ. 3ÍįÄžßÄ ŪäłŽ¶¨ÍĪį Ž™®Žďú Ž™®ŽĎź žßÄžõź (#759)
- **`TOOL_EXEC_FAILED` event** ‚ÄĒ ŽŹĄÍĶ¨ žč§ŪĖČ žč§ŪĆ® žčúžóźŽßĆ ŽįúŪôĒŪēėŽäĒ ž†Ąžö© observer hook. error, error_type, recoverable ŪŹ¨Ūē® (#759)
- **`TOOL_RESULT_TRANSFORM` event** ‚ÄĒ TOOL_EXEC_END ÍīÄžł°Í≥ľ Ž∂ĄŽ¶¨Žźú Í≤įÍ≥ľ Ž≥ÄŪôė ž†Ąžö© feedback hook. Hermes `transform_tool_result` ŪĆ®ŪĄī (#759)
- **Claude Opus 4.7** ‚ÄĒ ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY žäĻÍ≤©. 1M context, $5/$25, Í≥†ŪēīžÉĀŽŹĄ ŽĻĄž†Ą, task budgets. Fallback: opus-4-7‚Üíopus-4-6‚Üísonnet-4-6 (#771)
- **Codex OAuth pipeline** ‚ÄĒ proactive refresh (120s ž†Ą), 401 auto-refresh, credential scrubbing (`scrub.py`), ZAI profile ŽďĪŽ°Ě (#763)
- **ProfileRotator wiring** ‚ÄĒ `mark_success()`/`mark_failure()` LLM Ūėłž∂ú ž≤īžĚłžóź žôÄžĚīžĖīŽßĀ. 8Íįú audit logger ŽĻĄŽĆÄžĻ≠ ŪēīžÜĆ (#765)
- **`geode skill` CLI** ‚ÄĒ `list`/`create`/`show`/`remove` + 3-tier visibility (`public`/`private`/`unlisted`) (#767)
- **GLM-5.1 model** ‚ÄĒ Z.AI GLM-5.1 (SWE-Bench Pro 1žúĄ, MIT) ž∂ĒÍįÄ ŽįŹ GLM_PRIMARY žäĻÍ≤©. GLM-5V-Turbo, GLM-5-Turbo ÍįÄÍ≤© ÍįĪžč† (#729)
- **`geode doctor slack`** ‚ÄĒ Slack Gateway 7-point diagnostic (env, token, scopes, bindings, serve, MCP, socket). CLI + natural language tool (#57)
- **Slack App Manifest URL** ‚ÄĒ `get_manifest_url()` žõźŪĀīŽ¶≠ žēĪ žÉĚžĄĪ URL
- **OSS compliance files** ‚ÄĒ NOTICE, CONTRIBUTING.md (DCO), CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, Issue/PR templates, .env.example (#744)
- **OSS templates** ‚ÄĒ `docs/progress.md` kanban, `docs/plans/TEMPLATE.md`, `docs/workflow.md`, `.geode/skills/TEMPLATE.md` (#746)

### Fixed
- **GLM auth infinite retry** ‚ÄĒ `classify_llm_error()` now handles OpenAI SDK exceptions (was Anthropic-only). Auth errors trigger immediate cross-provider escalation instead of cycling within same provider (#740)
- **Model escalation ‚ÜĒ settings sync** ‚ÄĒ `_persist_escalated_model()` prevents `_sync_model_from_settings()` from reverting escalation (#740)
- **BashTool cwd** ‚ÄĒ defaults to `get_project_root()` (user's workspace) instead of GEODE install path (#748)
- **LLM client resource leaks** ‚ÄĒ `try/finally` + `close()` for OpenAI/Anthropic clients in `llm_extract_learning.py` (#731)
- **CI flaky test** ‚ÄĒ `test_select_by_number` now sets initial model explicitly (#740)

### Removed
- **Internal docs** ‚ÄĒ `docs/progress.md` (kanban data), `docs/plans/` (32 planning docs), `docs/workflow.md` (internal scaffold), `docs/reports/` (5 completion reports) ‚ÄĒ replaced with public templates (#744)
- **Personal skills** ‚ÄĒ job-hunter, expense-tracker, youtube-planner, daily-briefing, weekly-retro, slack-digest (#744)

### Infrastructure
- **.gitignore guardrails** ‚ÄĒ blocks personal skills, memory, scaffold harness, temporary artifacts from being committed (#746)

## [0.48.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-04-11

### Added
- **Hook interceptor pattern** ‚ÄĒ `trigger_interceptor()` method with block/modify chain semantics. Hooks can now block execution (`{"block": True}`) or modify event data (`{"modify": {...}}`), transitioning from pure observer to observer + interceptor. Per-hook timeout via `ThreadPoolExecutor`
- **6 new HookEvents (49 ‚Üí 55)**: `USER_INPUT_RECEIVED` (interceptor-capable), `TOOL_EXEC_START/END` (tool execution observability), `COST_WARNING/LIMIT_EXCEEDED` (cost guard at 80%/100%), `EXECUTION_CANCELLED` (cancel audit trail)
- **Session cost guard** ‚ÄĒ `cost_limit_usd` config field. Fires `COST_WARNING` at 80% and `COST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` at 100% of budget

### Fixed
- **Sandbox hardening** ‚ÄĒ 4 crash/safety fixes:
  - `path.resolve()` OSError defense in `add/remove_working_directory()`
  - macOS `/private/var` regex: `r"^/private/var/"` ‚Üí `r"^/private/var(/|$)"` ‚ÄĒ trailing slash no longer required
  - `_additional_dirs` thread safety with `threading.Lock` ‚ÄĒ concurrent sub-agent safety
  - Symlink LRU cache removed ‚ÄĒ prevents stale resolution in long-running sessions

### Fixed
- **Slack poller message loss on processing failure** ‚ÄĒ ts was updated BEFORE processing, so if LLM call failed mid-batch, remaining messages were permanently skipped. Now uses deferred-ts pattern: advance only AFTER successful processing, break on failure for retry next cycle
- **Slack app mention not detected** ‚ÄĒ `<@A...>` (app mention format) was not matched by `_is_mentioned()` regex, causing `require_mention=true` channels to silently ignore app mentions. Added `A` to the `[UBA]` character class in both `_is_mentioned` and `_strip_mentions`

### Added
- **Lazy directory creation** ‚ÄĒ `ensure_directories()` in `core/paths.py` creates all `~/.geode/` and `.geode/` directories at bootstrap. Follows Claude Code's lazy `mkdir(recursive)` pattern. Fresh `uv run geode` on clean install now works without manual setup
- `.gitignore` auto-entry for `.geode/` on first run

### Architecture
- **Layer violation fix (3 cross-layer dependency violations resolved)**:
  - `agentic_response.py` moved from `core/cli/` (L5) ‚Üí `core/llm/` (L2) ‚ÄĒ eliminates L2‚ÜíL5 import in LLM providers/router. `core/cli/agentic_response.py` retained as backward-compatible re-export
  - `MODEL_PRICING` dead re-export removed from `core/config.py` ‚ÄĒ eliminates L1‚ÜíL2 import (no callers used `core.config.MODEL_PRICING`)
  - `RightsRiskResult`, `RightsStatus`, `LicenseInfo` moved from `core/verification/` (L3) ‚Üí `core/state.py` (L1) ‚ÄĒ eliminates L1‚ÜíL3 import. `rights_risk.py` re-exports from `core.state`
- **ContextVar thread propagation fix** ‚ÄĒ `invoke_with_timeout()` ThreadPoolExecutoržóź `contextvars.copy_context()` ž∂ĒÍįÄ. graph nodežóźžĄú memory/profile/domain adapterÍįÄ NonežĚī ŽźėŽćė CRITICAL race condition žąėž†ē
- **Hook deduplication** ‚ÄĒ `HookSystem.register()` name ÍłįŽįė ž§ĎŽ≥Ķ Žį©žßÄ. explicit + filesystem discovery žĚīž§Ď ŽďĪŽ°Ě ŪēīžÜĆ
- **LLM router decomposition** ‚ÄĒ `adapters.py` (355ž§Ą, Protocol 7Íįú + ClaudeAdapter + resolve_agentic_adapter) + `provider_dispatch.py` (269ž§Ą, retry/circuit breaker/cross-provider) ž∂Ēž∂ú. router.py 1530‚Üí1062ž§Ą (-31%)

### Added
- **Sandbox validation module (Claude Code parity)** ‚ÄĒ `core/tools/sandbox.py` ž§Ďžēô Ž™®Žďą žč†žĄ§. 14/15 GAP ŪēīžÜĆ:
  - Shell expansion blocking ($VAR, ${VAR}, $(cmd), %VAR%, ~user) ‚ÄĒ TOCTOU prevention
  - Dangerous file/directory blocking (.gitconfig, .bashrc, .git/, .claude/) ‚ÄĒ write only
  - Symlink chain resolution with intermediate validation + lru_cache memoize
  - macOS path normalization (/private/var ‚ÜĒ /var, /private/tmp ‚ÜĒ /tmp bilateral)
  - Glob pattern blocking in write operations
  - Session-scoped additional working directories API (add/remove)
  - ReadDocumentTool offset/limit + file size guard (256KB pre-read, 25K token post-read)
  - Sandbox settings externalization (config.toml [sandbox] section)
  - Configurable limits for glob/grep results
  - Sub-agent working directory isolation

## [0.47.1] ‚ÄĒ 2026-04-07

### Added
- **Max jobs 50 ž†úŪēú** ‚ÄĒ `add_job()` žÉĀŪēú ž≤īŪĀ¨. Ž¨īŪēú job žÉĚžĄĪ Žį©žßÄ (claude-code MAX_JOBS ŪĆ®ŪĄī)
- **Lock session identity** ‚ÄĒ `SchedulerLock`žóź `session_id` ž∂ĒÍįÄ. serve restart žčú ÍįôžĚÄ žĄłžÖėžĚīŽ©ī ž¶Čžčú lock žě¨ž∑®ŽďĚ (idempotent re-acquire)
- **Recurring age-out** ‚ÄĒ 30žĚľ žßÄŽāú recurring job žěźŽŹô žā≠ž†ú + `permanent` flag Ž©īž†ú. stale job ŽąĄž†Ā Žį©žßÄ
- **Sub-agent scheduler routing** ‚ÄĒ `ScheduledJob.agent_id` ŪēĄŽďú + `OnJobFired` 4-arg callback. sub-agentŽ≥Ą job žÜĆžú† ŽįŹ fire ŽĚľžöįŪĆÖ

### Architecture
- **AgenticLoop SRP decomposition** ‚ÄĒ context window management extracted to `context_manager.py` (410 lines), convergence detection to `convergence.py` (114 lines). agentic_loop.py 1818 ‚Üí 1405 lines (-23%)
- **CLI __init__.py module extraction** ‚ÄĒ memory_handler, scheduler_drain, terminal extracted to dedicated modules. cli/__init__.py 1892 ‚Üí 1641 lines (-13%)
- **Runtime.create() staged builders** ‚ÄĒ monolithic 122-line factory split into 4 staged private methods (_build_core, _build_tools, _build_memory_and_automation)
- **Hook layer violation fix** ‚ÄĒ auto_learn.py L6‚ÜíL5 dependency eliminated via profile_provider DI injection at bootstrap

### Fixed
- **FALLBACK_CROSS_PROVIDER hook never emitted** ‚ÄĒ cross-provider model escalation now fires the dedicated observability hook with provider-level context
- **signal_adapter ContextVar encapsulation** ‚ÄĒ added `get_signal_adapter()` public getter, replaced private `_signal_adapter_ctx.get()` access

## [0.47.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-04-07

### Added
- **Scheduler GAP-close (claude-code alignment)** ‚ÄĒ 8 architectural gaps closed:
  - Project-local storage (`.geode/scheduled_tasks.json`) ‚ÄĒ per-project isolation
  - O_EXCL lock + PID liveness probe ‚ÄĒ cross-platform multi-session coordination
  - `on_job_fired` callback protocol ‚ÄĒ decoupled from `queue.Queue`
  - Session-only tasks (`durable=False`) ‚ÄĒ in-memory ephemeral scheduling
  - Deterministic per-job jitter (SHA-256 hash) ‚ÄĒ thundering herd prevention
  - 1s check interval + mtime file watch ‚ÄĒ responsive scheduling with external change detection
  - Missed task recovery ‚ÄĒ AT/EVERY jobs recovered on startup with grace window
  - `create_scheduler()` factory ‚ÄĒ library-style instantiation for any context
- **3 new test modules** ‚ÄĒ `test_scheduler_lock.py`, `test_scheduler_jitter.py`, `test_scheduler_missed.py` (36 tests)

### Changed
- Scheduler default check interval 60s ‚Üí 1s
- `SchedulerService` default `enable_jitter=True`
- Legacy `fcntl.flock` replaced with `SchedulerLock` (O_EXCL + PID probe)
- `action_queue: queue.Queue` deprecated in favor of `on_job_fired: Callable`

### Fixed
- **Sandbox project root CWD ÍłįŽįėžúľŽ°ú ž†ĄŪôė** ‚ÄĒ `_PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).parent¬≥` ŪēėŽďúžĹĒŽĒ© ‚Üí `get_project_root()` (CWD žļ°ž≤ė). žôłŽ∂Ä žõĆŪĀ¨žä§ŪéėžĚīžä§žóźžĄú `geode` žč§ŪĖČ žčú ŪĆĆžĚľ ŽŹĄÍĶ¨ÍįÄ "path outside project directory" žė§Ž•ė ŽįúžÉĚŪēėŽćė Ž≤ĄÍ∑ł žąėž†ē. Claude Code `originalCwd` ŪĆ®ŪĄī žĚīžčĚ

## [0.40.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-31

### Added

## [0.39.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-31

### Added
- **IPC pipeline event parity** ‚ÄĒ thin client now receives all pipeline data that direct CLI renders:
  - Signals (YouTube views, Reddit subscribers, FanArt YoY%) in `pipeline_gather` event
  - PSM causal inference (ATT%, Z-value, Rosenbaum Gamma) in `pipeline_score` event with significance indicators
  - Pipeline warnings/errors in `pipeline_result` event
  - Guardrail failure details in `pipeline_verification` event
- **ToolCallTracker.suspend()** ‚ÄĒ erases rendered spinner lines and resets cursor position, preventing ANSI cursor-up from corrupting interleaved pipeline/stream output
- **Pipeline ip_name tagging** ‚ÄĒ `set_pipeline_ip()` thread-local for forward-compatible parallel UI (Option B: IP-sequential queueing)
- **Gateway context overflow recovery** ‚ÄĒ pre-call context check prevents 400 errors; auto-clear session on context exhaustion; i18n exhaustion messages via Haiku
- **CJK-aware tool tracker** ‚ÄĒ `_truncate_display()` uses `unicodedata.east_asian_width` for correct CJK character width; spinner moved to left side

### Fixed
- **list_ips spinner duplication** ‚ÄĒ `stop()` called per stream chunk reprinted spinner each time; now uses `suspend()` with position reset
- **analyze_ip spinner/panel collision** ‚ÄĒ 9 pipeline event handlers changed from `_clear_activity_line()` to `_suppress_all_spinners()`, stopping tracker before writing
- **Rich Panel cursor-up interference** ‚ÄĒ stale `_line_count` caused cursor-up to erase interleaved pipeline event output
- **400 error silent swallow** ‚ÄĒ `call_with_failover` now re-raises context-overflow BadRequestError instead of returning None

### Removed
- **Stub insight generator** ‚ÄĒ `PIPELINE_END‚Üíadd_insight` hook removed; generated broken `tier=?/score=0.00` entries because synthesizer input state didn't reliably contain scoring results. Pipeline results are recorded in journal (`runs.jsonl`) via JournalHook.

## [0.38.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-30

### Added
- **LLM Resilience Hardening** ‚ÄĒ 14-item 3-phase plan fully implemented across Agentic Loop, Domain DAG, and shared LLM infrastructure:
  - **Backoff jitter** (C1) ‚ÄĒ full jitter (`random.uniform`) replaces deterministic delay, preventing thundering herd.
  - **Cross-provider failover** (C1-b) ‚ÄĒ `_cross_provider_dispatch()` in router.py; opt-in via `llm_cross_provider_failover`.
  - **Degraded fallback** (B1) ‚ÄĒ retry-exhausted analyst/evaluator/scoring nodes return `is_degraded=True` results instead of crashing the pipeline.
  - **Pipeline timeout** (B3) ‚ÄĒ `invoke_with_timeout()` with `PIPELINE_TIMEOUT` hook event. Config: `pipeline_timeout_s` (default 600s).
  - **Degraded scoring penalty** (B4) ‚ÄĒ degraded sources proportionally reduce confidence in final score.
  - **Verification enrichment loop** (B5) ‚ÄĒ guardrails/biasbuster failure triggers gather loopback (before confidence check).
  - **Evaluator partial retry** (B6) ‚ÄĒ non-degraded evaluators skipped on re-iteration (mirrors analyst pattern).
  - **Iteration history trimming** (B7) ‚ÄĒ custom reducer caps `iteration_history` at 10 entries.
  - **Fallback cost ratio** (C2) ‚ÄĒ `llm_max_fallback_cost_ratio` filters expensive fallback models upfront.
  - **Error propagation** (B2) ‚ÄĒ pipeline `state["errors"]` included in MCP caller output.
  - **Gather retryable** (B8) ‚ÄĒ gather node added to `_RETRYABLE_NODES`.
  - **Cost budget hardening** (A2) ‚ÄĒ specific exceptions, 80% proactive warning, hard termination.
  - **Checkpoint resume** (A3) ‚ÄĒ `SessionCheckpoint` per-round save, auto-checkpoint before failures.
  - **Aggressive context recovery** ‚ÄĒ continue loop after context exhaustion with summarize + halved-keep prune.
- **Error classification** ‚ÄĒ `core/llm/errors.py`: typed error hierarchy (rate limit, auth, billing, context overflow) with severity + hint.
- **HookSystem 42 events** ‚ÄĒ `FALLBACK_CROSS_PROVIDER` + `PIPELINE_TIMEOUT` (40 ‚Üí 42).
- **Resilience test suite** ‚ÄĒ 34 new tests covering all resilience scenarios.

### Fixed
- **Sequential tool rendering duplicates** ‚ÄĒ `ToolCallTracker` accumulated completed entries across batches, causing stale lines (e.g. `sequentialthinking` showing duplicate spinner rows). Now clears previous batch on new batch start.

## [0.37.2] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-30

### Added
- **Persistent activity spinner** ‚ÄĒ thin client shows animated `Working...` spinner from prompt send until result arrives. Thinking/tool spinners override it; resumes between events.
- **Pipeline client-side rendering** ‚ÄĒ `panels.py` detects IPC mode ‚Üí emits structured event + returns early (no duplicate raw ANSI stream). Thin client renders all pipeline milestones from structured events.
- **`pipeline_header` / `pipeline_result` events** ‚ÄĒ 2 new event types (28 ‚Üí 30 total).

### Fixed
- **Thinking spinner frozen** ‚ÄĒ `EventRenderer` thinking spinner was rendering 1 frame then freezing until next event. Now uses daemon thread animation (80ms per frame), matching `ToolCallTracker` pattern.
- **Tool duration inaccurate** ‚ÄĒ `tool_end` event now includes server-measured `duration_s`. Client prefers server duration over client-side measurement (excludes IPC transport latency).
- **`/model` hot-swap (P0)** ‚ÄĒ `_apply_model()` now calls `loop.update_model()` on the active AgenticLoop. Model changes take effect immediately in the current IPC session without reconnecting.
- **`/quit` session cost (P1)** ‚ÄĒ `/quit` and `/exit` now relay to serve instead of running locally. Session cost summary renders with real accumulator data from the serve process.

### Added
- **`--continue` / `--resume` (P2)** ‚ÄĒ IPC resume protocol wired end-to-end. `geode --continue` resumes the most recent session; `geode --resume <id>` resumes a specific session. Checkpoint messages and model are restored into the conversation context.
- **IPC `resume` message type** ‚ÄĒ CLIPoller handles `{"type": "resume"}` messages, loads checkpoint via `SessionCheckpoint`, and restores conversation context + loop session ID.
- **`IPCClient.request_resume()`** ‚ÄĒ thin client method to request session resume from serve.
- **Event Schema V2 ‚ÄĒ 16 new structured IPC events** expanding coverage from 12 ‚Üí 28 event types:
  - AgenticLoop termination: `model_escalation`, `cost_budget_exceeded`, `time_budget_expired`, `convergence_detected`
  - AgenticLoop strategy: `goal_decomposition`, `tool_backpressure`, `tool_diversity_forced`
  - AgenticLoop lifecycle: `model_switched`, `checkpoint_saved`
  - Pipeline milestones: `pipeline_gather`, `pipeline_analysis`, `pipeline_evaluation`, `pipeline_score`, `pipeline_verification`
  - Pipeline control flow: `feedback_loop`, `node_skipped`
- **EventRenderer V2** ‚ÄĒ client-side handlers for all 16 new events with ANSI rendering.

## [0.37.1] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-30

### Fixed
- **serve auto-start cwd** ‚ÄĒ `start_serve_if_needed()` resolves GEODE project root via `__file__` path. Works from any directory.
- **sys.executable mismatch** ‚ÄĒ `shutil.which("geode")` instead of `sys.executable` for subprocess spawn.
- **SessionMode.IPC quiet** ‚ÄĒ `quiet=True` suppresses AgenticLoop UI on serve terminal; results via IPC JSON only.
- **Thin client UX** ‚ÄĒ thinking spinner during prompt relay, status line (model/rounds/tools) after response, serve auto-start spinner.
- **tool_calls dict handling** ‚ÄĒ CLIPoller handles both dict and object tool call formats.
- **auto-start timeout** ‚ÄĒ 10s ‚Üí 30s (MCP 13-server startup takes ~20s).

### Known Issues
- `/model` (interactive menu) requires terminal ‚ÄĒ does not work in thin mode. Use `/model <name>` with explicit arg.

## [0.37.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-30

### Changed
- **Thin-only architecture** ‚ÄĒ standalone REPL eliminated (~487 lines deleted). `geode` always connects to serve via IPC; auto-starts serve if not running. Single code path for all execution: CLI, Slack/Discord, Scheduler all route through `acquire_all(key, ["session", "global"])`.
- **SessionMode.IPC** ‚ÄĒ new session mode for thin CLI client. `hitl=0` (WRITE allowed, DANGEROUS policy-blocked). Replaces `SessionMode.REPL` for IPC connections.
- **CLIPoller hardened** ‚ÄĒ `acquire_all()` gating, `chmod 0o600` on Unix socket, `command` type in IPC protocol for slash command relay.
- **SessionLane ‚ÄĒ per-key serialization** ‚ÄĒ replaced 4-lane system (session/global/gateway/scheduler) with OpenClaw pattern: `SessionLane` (per-session-key `Semaphore(1)`) + `Lane("global", max=8)`. Same session key serializes, different keys parallel. `acquire_all(key, ["session", "global"])` unifies all execution paths. OpenClaw defect fixes: `max_sessions=256` cap, `cleanup_idle()` eviction.
- **Unified bootstrap** ‚ÄĒ `serve()` no longer calls `bootstrap_geode()`. Uses `setup_contextvars()` + `GeodeRuntime.create()` directly. ONE HookSystem, ONE MCP manager, ONE SkillRegistry across all entry points. Resolves C1/C2/H1/H4/H5 from structural audit.

### Added
- **CLIChannel IPC** ‚ÄĒ Unix domain socket (`~/.geode/cli.sock`) connects thin CLI client to `geode serve`. `CLIPoller` accepts local connections, creates REPL sessions via SharedServices. `IPCClient` auto-detects serve and delegates agentic execution over line-delimited JSON protocol. Fallback to standalone when serve is not running.
- **Scheduler in serve mode** ‚ÄĒ `SchedulerService` extracted from REPL into `geode serve`. Scheduled jobs now fire in headless mode. Shared `_drain_scheduler_queue()` helper eliminates duplication between REPL and serve paths.
- **Lane.acquire_timeout()** ‚ÄĒ blocking-with-timeout acquisition for Lane semaphores.
- **SessionLane class** ‚ÄĒ per-key `Semaphore(1)`, `max_sessions=256`, idle cleanup at 300s.
- **Serve auto-start** ‚ÄĒ background daemon spawn with pidfile lock. `geode` thin CLI auto-starts serve if not running.
- **IPC command type** ‚ÄĒ slash command server-side relay via `command` type in IPC protocol.

### Fixed
- **C3: Dual Scheduler race** ‚ÄĒ `fcntl.flock(LOCK_EX/LOCK_SH)` on `jobs.json` save/load. REPL and serve can no longer corrupt shared job store via concurrent file access.
- **H2: Scheduler ‚Üí LaneQueue** ‚ÄĒ replaced ad-hoc `Semaphore(2)` with `Lane.try_acquire()`/`manual_release()`. Scheduler concurrency now routes through the central LaneQueue system.
- **M2: Scheduler PolicyChain** ‚ÄĒ `create_session(SCHEDULER/DAEMON)` filters DANGEROUS tools (`run_bash`, `delegate_task`). Headless modes can no longer invoke tools requiring HITL approval.
- **M3: Stuck job detection** ‚ÄĒ `running_since_ms` field tracks active jobs. `detect_stuck_jobs()` runs each tick, marks jobs exceeding 10min threshold as `stuck`, fires hook.
- **TOCTOU race in start_serve_if_needed** ‚ÄĒ pidfile lock prevents race between check and spawn.
- **Sub-agent depth guard** ‚ÄĒ explicit `if depth >= max_depth` check replaces implicit gating.
- **Scheduler drain exception safety** ‚ÄĒ lane slot leak on `create_session()` failure fixed. `main_loop.run()` exception no longer kills the drain loop. Init failure in serve promoted to `log.warning`.
- **P1 batch (5 fixes)** ‚ÄĒ C3/C4 regression tests, WorkerRequest `time_budget_s` pass-through, thread-mode `denied_tools` raises (was warn), announce TTL reset (`setdefault` ‚Üí assignment), subprocess env whitelist +2 vars.

### Removed
- **CoalescingQueue** ‚ÄĒ 148 lines, no-op callback, 0 trigger rate. Removed entirely.
- **Standalone REPL `_interactive_loop`** ‚ÄĒ ~487 lines eliminated. All execution routes through serve.
- **Gateway/scheduler named lanes** ‚ÄĒ replaced by SessionLane per-key serialization.
- **IsolatedRunner internal Semaphore** ‚ÄĒ replaced by `Lane("global", max=8)`.

### Architecture
- **6-Layer ‚Üí 4-Layer Stack** ‚ÄĒ Model ‚Üí Runtime ‚Üí Harness ‚Üí Agent, with orthogonal Domain (`‚ä• Domain`). Simplified from previous L0-L5 numbering.
- **M1: Config-driven pollers** ‚ÄĒ `build_gateway()` reads `[gateway] pollers` from `config.toml`. Dynamic `_POLLER_REGISTRY` replaces hardcoded `register_poller()` calls. Default: all three (slack, discord, telegram).
- **19 legacy docs moved to archive** ‚ÄĒ outdated architecture and plan documents relocated to `docs/archive/`.

## [0.35.1] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-29

### Fixed
- **C1: agentic_ref race** ‚ÄĒ removed shared mutable `agentic_ref[0]` from SharedServices. Tool handlers now use `_current_loop_ctx` ContextVar (per-thread, no cross-session contamination). Scheduler can no longer corrupt REPL's loop pointer.
- **C2: TaskGraph thread safety** ‚ÄĒ `threading.Lock` on `get_ready_tasks()`, `mark_running()`, `mark_completed()`, `mark_failed()`, `add_task()`. Prevents double-execution from concurrent state transitions.
- **C3: IsolatedRunner semaphore leak** ‚ÄĒ semaphore release guarded by `acquired` flag. Timeout on `_acquire_slot` no longer leaks extra permits beyond `MAX_CONCURRENT`.
- **C4: LaneQueue acquire_all()** ‚ÄĒ tracks acquired semaphores separately from active tracking. Partial failure only releases actually-acquired semaphores.
- **H1: Zombie thread cleanup** ‚ÄĒ timeout threads removed from `_active`/`_cancel_flags` tracking.
- **H2: Announce double-publish** ‚ÄĒ atomic check-and-set inside `_announce_lock`.
- **H3: Announce orphan TTL** ‚ÄĒ 300s auto-expiry for stale queue entries.
- **H4: Subprocess env whitelist** ‚ÄĒ 10 safe vars only (no full `os.environ` copy).
- **H8: TaskBridge evaluator lock** ‚ÄĒ `_evaluator_lock` on counter increment.
- **M1: MODEL_SWITCHED duplicate** ‚ÄĒ removed duplicate C7 handler registration.

### Changed
- **HookEvent count 46‚Üí40** ‚ÄĒ removed 6 orphan events: CONTEXT_WARNING, PROMPT_DRIFT_DETECTED, GATEWAY_MESSAGE/RESPONSE, MCP_SERVER_STARTED/STOPPED.

## [0.35.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-29

### Added
- **SharedServices Gateway** ‚ÄĒ single factory for all session modes (REPL/DAEMON/SCHEDULER/FORK). Codex CLI `ThreadManagerState` + OpenClaw Gateway pattern. `create_session(mode)` guarantees identical shared resources across all entry points.
- **SessionMode enum** ‚ÄĒ `REPL` (hitl=2, interactive), `DAEMON` (hitl=0, Slack/Discord), `SCHEDULER` (hitl=0, 300s cap), `FORK` (hitl=0, 60s cap).

### Changed
- **Time-based constraints** ‚ÄĒ `DEFAULT_MAX_ROUNDS=0` (unlimited) for all modes. `time_budget_s` is the sole execution constraint. `ChannelBinding.max_rounds` replaced by `time_budget_s` (120s default). Legacy `max_rounds` config auto-converted.
- **GATEWAY ‚Üí DAEMON** ‚ÄĒ external channel poller mode renamed to `DAEMON`. "Gateway" now refers to the SharedServices layer.

### Fixed
- **HookSystem wired** ‚ÄĒ `build_hooks()` called at bootstrap, injected into every `create_session()`. `_fire_hook()` now works (was permanently None).
- **Globals ‚Üí ContextVar** ‚ÄĒ `_project_memory`, `_user_profile`, `_readiness` converted from module-level globals to `ContextVar`. Thread-safe across DAEMON/SCHEDULER threads.
- **Scheduler ContextVar propagation** ‚ÄĒ `propagate_context=True` in `create_session(SCHEDULER)` re-injects domain/memory/profile before job execution.

### Architecture
- **5 Shared Services GAPs resolved** ‚ÄĒ HookSystem(CRITICAL‚Üífixed), globals(HIGH‚Üífixed), scheduler propagation(HIGH‚Üífixed), _readiness(MEDIUM‚Üífixed), _result_cache(LOW‚Üíalready had Lock).

## [0.31.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-28

### Added
- **Action Summary (Tier 1)** --- AgenticLoop ŪĄī žĘÖŽ£Ć žčú ÍįúŽ≥Ą ŽŹĄÍĶ¨ Ūėłž∂ú + Í≤įÍ≥ľŽ•ľ Í≤įž†ēŽ°†ž†ĀžúľŽ°ú žöĒžēĹ ŪĎúžčú. `AgenticResult.summary` ŪēĄŽďúžóź ž†Äžě•. ŪÜ†ŪĀį ŽĻĄžö© 0.
- **Gateway binding hot-reload** --- `ConfigWatcher` watches `.geode/config.toml` and reloads `ChannelManager` bindings on file change (OpenClaw hot-reload pattern). No restart required.
- **L4 webhook endpoint** --- `geode serve` optionally starts an HTTP POST endpoint (`/webhook`, default port 8765) that triggers AgenticLoop execution from external systems (OpenClaw L4 Gateway Hooks pattern). Controlled by `GEODE_WEBHOOK_ENABLED` / `GEODE_WEBHOOK_PORT` settings.
- **TOOL_APPROVAL hooks** --- `TOOL_APPROVAL_REQUESTED`, `TOOL_APPROVAL_GRANTED`, `TOOL_APPROVAL_DENIED` 3žĘÖ HookEvent ž∂ĒÍįÄ (42 -> 45). HITL žäĻžĚł/ÍĪįŽ∂Ä/Always ŪĆ®ŪĄī ž∂Ēž†Ā. `ToolExecutor`žóź hooks ž£ľžěÖ, `bootstrap.py`žóź `approval_tracker`/`denial_logger` ŪēłŽď§Žü¨ ŽďĪŽ°Ě.

### Fixed
- **TOOL_APPROVAL žĚīŽ≤§ŪäłŽ™Ö Ž∂ąžĚľžĻė žąėž†ē** ‚ÄĒ `tool_approval_decided` ‚Üí `tool_approval_granted`/`tool_approval_denied` Ž∂ĄŽ¶¨. žĚīž†Ą žĹĒŽďúžóźžĄú `_emit_hook("tool_approval_decided")`ÍįÄ HookEventžóź žóÜžĖī ValueError žāľŪāī ‚Üí žč§ž†ú ŽįúŪôĒ žēą ŽźėŽäĒ Ž≤ĄÍ∑ł ŪēīžÜĆ.
- **LLM_CALL_START / LLM_CALL_END hooks** ‚ÄĒ LLM Ūėłž∂ú ž†ĄŪõĄ ŽįúŪôĒŽ°ú model-level latency/cost observability ž†úÍ≥Ķ. `call_llm()`, `call_llm_with_tools()` Í≥Ąžł°. 10žīą žīąÍ≥ľ žčú slow call Í≤ĹÍ≥† Ž°úÍĻÖ. Hook 42Íįú.
- **SESSION_START / SESSION_END hooks** ‚ÄĒ REPL žĄłžÖė žčúžěĎ/žĘÖŽ£Ć žčú ŽįúŪôĒ (OpenClaw `agent:bootstrap` ŪĆ®ŪĄī).
- **CONTEXT_OVERFLOW_ACTION hook** ‚ÄĒ žēēž∂ē ž†ĄŽěĶžĚĄ Hook ŪēłŽď§Žü¨ÍįÄ Í≤įž†ē. `trigger_with_result()`Ž°ú ŪēłŽď§Žü¨ ŽįėŪôėÍįí ŪĒľŽďúŽįĪ. `context_action.py` ÍłįŽ≥ł ŪēłŽď§Žü¨ ž†úÍ≥Ķ.
- **Scheduler action queue** ‚ÄĒ `ScheduledJob.action` ŪēĄŽďú ž∂ĒÍįÄ. žõźŽ¨ł ŪÖćžä§ŪäłŽ•ľ Í∑łŽĆÄŽ°ú ž†Äžě•(ž†ēÍ∑úžčĚ ž∂Ēž∂ú ž†úÍĪį). `SchedulerService`ÍįÄ job ŽįúŪôĒ žčú `action_queue`žóź žāĹžěÖ. REPLžĚī `[scheduled-job:{id}]` ŪĒĄŽ†ąžĚīŽįćžúľŽ°ú AgenticLoopžóź žúĄžěĄ ‚ÄĒ LLMžĚī žěźž≤ī ŪĆźŽč®žúľŽ°ú žä§žľÄž§Ą žĚėŽŹĄŽ•ľ Ž∂ĄŽ¶¨Ūēėžó¨ žč§ŪĖČ.
- **Cron žĄłžÖė Í≤©Ž¶¨** ‚ÄĒ `ScheduledJob.isolated` ŪēĄŽďú ž∂ĒÍįÄ (ÍłįŽ≥łÍįí `True`). OpenClaw `agentTurn` ŪĆ®ŪĄī: žä§žľÄž§Ą ŽįúŪôĒ žčú fresh ConversationContext + AgenticLoopžóźžĄú ŽŹÖŽ¶Ĺ žč§ŪĖČŪēėžó¨ Ž©ĒžĚł ŽĆÄŪôĒ žė§žóľ Žį©žßÄ. `isolated=False`(systemEvent)Ž°ú Ž©ĒžĚł žĄłžÖė ž£ľžěÖŽŹĄ ÍįÄŽä•.
- **TURN_COMPLETE žěźŽŹô Ž©ĒŽ™®Ž¶¨** ‚ÄĒ 37Ž≤ąžßł HookEvent. AgenticLoop Žß§ ŪĄī žĘÖŽ£Ć žčú ŽįúŪôĒ, user_input + tool_calls + result ŽćįžĚīŪĄį ž†ĄŽč¨. `turn_auto_memory` ŪēłŽď§Žü¨ÍįÄ žěźŽŹôžúľŽ°ú project memoryžóź ŪĄī žöĒžēĹ ÍłįŽ°Ě (OpenClaw `command:new` ŪĆ®ŪĄī).

## [0.22.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-21

Sandbox Hardening + REODE žěźžú® žöīŪĖČ ŪēėŽĄ§žä§ ŪĆ®ŪĄī žó≠žąėžěÖ + Ūíąžßą žä§Ūā¨ ŪŹ¨ŪĆÖ.

### Added

#### Sandbox Hardening
- PolicyChain L1-2 žôÄžĚīžĖīŽßĀ ‚ÄĒ `load_profile_policy()` + `load_org_policy()` ‚Üí `build_6layer_chain()`žúľŽ°ú Profile/Org/Mode ŪÜĶŪē© ž≤īžĚł ÍĶ¨žĄĪ
- SubAgent Tool Scope ‚ÄĒ `denied_tools` ŪĆĆŽĚľŽĮłŪĄį + `SUBAGENT_DENIED_TOOLS` žÉĀžąė (6Íįú ŽĮľÍįź ŽŹĄÍĶ¨ žĄúŽłĆžóźžĚīž†ĄŪäł ž†ĎÍ∑ľ žį®Žč®)
- Bash Resource Limits ‚ÄĒ `preexec_fn`žúľŽ°ú `resource.setrlimit` ž†Āžö© (CPU 30s, FSIZE 50MB, NPROC 64)
- Secret Redaction ‚ÄĒ `core/cli/redaction.py` žč†Í∑ú, 8Íįú API Ūā§ ŪĆ®ŪĄī(Anthropic/OpenAI/ZhipuAI/GitHub/Slack) ÍįźžßÄ ŽįŹ Žßąžä§ŪāĻ, BashTool + MCP tool resultžóź žěźŽŹô ž†Āžö©

#### Harness Patterns (REODE žó≠žąėžěÖ)
- Session-level tool approval (A=Always) ‚ÄĒ HITL ŪĒĄŽ°¨ŪĒĄŪäłžóź `[Y/n/A]` žėĶžÖė, žĄłžÖė ŽŹôžēą žĻīŪÖĆÍ≥†Ž¶¨Ž≥Ą žěźŽŹô žäĻžĚł
- HITL Level (0/1/2) ‚ÄĒ `GEODE_HITL_LEVEL` ŪôėÍ≤ĹŽ≥Äžąė (0=žěźžú®, 1=WRITEŽßĆ Ž¨ĽÍłį, 2=ž†ĄŽ∂Ä Ž¨ĽÍłį)
- Model Escalation ‚ÄĒ LLM žóįžÜć 2ŪöĆ žč§ŪĆ® žčú fallback chain Žč§žĚĆ Ž™®Žćł žěźŽŹô ž†ĄŪôė
- Cross-Provider Escalation ‚ÄĒ provider chain žÜĆžßĄ žčú secondary providerŽ°ú žěźŽŹô ž†ĄŪôė (anthropic‚ÜĒopenai, glm‚Üíopenai)
- Backpressure ‚ÄĒ tool žóįžÜć 3ŪöĆ žóźŽü¨ žčú 1s žŅ®Žč§žöī + "Žč§Ž•ł ž†ĎÍ∑ľ Í≥†Ž†§" ŪěĆŪäł ž£ľžěÖ
- Convergence Detection ‚ÄĒ ŽŹôžĚľ žóźŽü¨ 4ŪöĆ ŽįėŽ≥Ķ ‚Üí `convergence_detected`Ž°ú Ž£®ŪĒĄ žěźŽŹô ž§ĎŽč®
- Model-first Provider Inference ‚ÄĒ `_resolve_provider()` ÍįēŪôĒ (gpt/o3/o4‚Üíopenai, gemini‚Üígoogle, deepseek‚Üídeepseek, llama‚Üímeta, qwen‚Üíalibaba)

#### Skills (REODE žó≠žąėžěÖ)
- `explore-reason-act` ‚ÄĒ žĹĒŽďú žąėž†ē ž†Ą ŪÉźžÉČ-ž∂ĒŽ°†-žč§ŪĖČ 3Žč®Í≥Ą žõĆŪĀ¨ŪĒĆŽ°úžöį

- `code-review-quality` ‚ÄĒ Python 6-Ž†Ćž¶ą žĹĒŽďú Ūíąžßą Ž¶¨Ž∑į

## [0.8.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-11

Plan/Sub-agent NL integration, Claude Code-style UI, response quality hardening.

### Added

#### Plan & Sub-agent NL Integration
- `create_plan` tool ‚ÄĒ NLŽ°ú Ž∂ĄžĄĚ Í≥ĄŪöć žÉĚžĄĪ ("Berserk Ž∂ĄžĄĚ Í≥ĄŪöć žĄłžõĆž§ė")
- `approve_plan` tool ‚ÄĒ Í≥ĄŪöć žäĻžĚł ŽįŹ žč§ŪĖČ ("Í≥ĄŪöć žäĻžĚłŪēī")
- `delegate_task` tool ‚ÄĒ žĄúŽłĆžóźžĚīž†ĄŪäł Ž≥ĎŽ†¨ žúĄžěĄ ("Ž≥ĎŽ†¨Ž°ú ž≤ėŽ¶¨Ūēī")
- NL Router tool count: 17 ‚Üí 20 (plan/delegate 3Íįú ž∂ĒÍįÄ)
- Offline fallback: plan/delegate regex ŪĆ®ŪĄī ž∂ĒÍįÄ (LLM žóÜžĚī ŽŹôžěĎ)

#### Claude Code-style UI
- `core/ui/agentic_ui.py` ‚ÄĒ tool call/result/error/token/plan Ž†ĆŽćĒŽü¨
- `core/ui/console.py` ‚ÄĒ Rich Console žčĪÍłÄŪÜ§ (width=120, GEODE ŪÖĆŽßą)
- Marker system: `‚Ėł` tool call, `‚úď` success, `‚úó` error, `‚úĘ` tokens, `‚óŹ` plan

#### LangSmith Trace Coverage
- `@_maybe_traceable` added to verification layer: `run_guardrails`, `run_biasbuster`, `run_cross_llm_check`, `check_rights_risk`
- Full pipeline tracing coverage: router ‚Üí signals ‚Üí analysts ‚Üí evaluators ‚Üí scoring ‚Üí verification ‚Üí synthesizer

### Changed
- `AgenticLoop._process_tool_calls()`: `str(result)` ‚Üí `json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, default=str)` ‚ÄĒ LLMžĚī ŪĆĆžčĪ ÍįÄŽä•Ūēú JSON ŪėēžčĚžúľŽ°ú tool Í≤įÍ≥ľ ž†ĄŽč¨
- `snapshot._persist_snapshot()`: `json.dumps(..., default=str)` ‚ÄĒ non-serializable ŪēĄŽďú žēąž†Ą ž≤ėŽ¶¨
- `snapshot.capture()`: `_sanitize_state()` ž∂ĒÍįÄ ‚ÄĒ `_`-prefixed ŽāīŽ∂Ä ŪēĄŽďú ŪēĄŪĄįŽßĀ
- NL Router offline fallback žąúžĄú: plan/delegate ŪĆ®ŪĄīžĚĄ known IP Žß§žĻ≠Ž≥īŽč§ Ž®ľž†Ä Í≤Äžā¨

### Fixed
- Offline mode `_run_offline()`: action name("list") ‚Üí tool name("list_ips") Žß§ŪēĎ ŽąĄŽĚĹ žąėž†ē (`_ACTION_TO_TOOL` dict ž∂ĒÍįÄ)
- `_TOOL_ACTION_MAP` ŽąĄŽĚĹ: `create_plan`, `approve_plan`, `delegate_task` ŽĮłŽďĪŽ°Ě ‚Üí ž∂ĒÍįÄ

### Infrastructure
- Test count: 1909+ ‚Üí 2000+
- Module count: 116 ‚Üí 118
- `tests/test_agentic_ui.py` (20 tests), plan/delegate NL tests (20 tests)

## [0.7.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-11

Pipeline flexibility improvements (C2-C5), LangSmith observability, orchestration integration.

### Added

#### Pipeline Flexibility (C2-C5)
- **C2**: Analyst types dynamically loaded from YAML (`ANALYST_SPECIFIC.keys()`) ‚ÄĒ add analyst = add YAML key
- **C3**: `interrupt_before` support via `GEODE_INTERRUPT_NODES` env ‚ÄĒ pipeline pauses at specified nodes for user review
- **C4**: Dynamic tool addition via `ToolRegistry` in `AgenticLoop` ‚ÄĒ plugins register tools at runtime
- **C5**: `offline_mode` for `AgenticLoop` ‚ÄĒ regex-based tool routing without LLM (1 deterministic round)

#### LangSmith Observability
- Token tracking: `track_token_usage()` records input/output tokens + cost per LLM call
- `_maybe_traceable` decorator on `AgenticLoop.run()` and `_call_llm()` for RunTree tracing
- Cost calculation with per-model pricing (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, GPT)
- `UsageAccumulator` for session-level cost aggregation

#### Orchestration Integration
- `SubAgentManager` integration with `TaskGraph`, `HookSystem`, `CoalescingQueue`
- `AgenticLoop` rate limit retry with exponential backoff (3√ó at 10s/20s/40s)
- Tool handler enrichment: 17 handlers with structured return data

#### Testing & Verification
- `tests/test_e2e_live_llm.py` ‚ÄĒ 13 live E2E scenarios (AgenticLoop, LangSmith, Pipeline, Offline)
- `tests/_live_audit_runner.py` ‚ÄĒ 17-tool parallel audit framework
- 17/17 tool handlers verified via AgenticLoop + Opus 4.6 (live audit PASS)
- `docs/e2e-orchestration-scenarios.md` ‚ÄĒ E2E scenario documentation

#### Documentation
- `docs/as-is-to-be-flexibility.md` ‚ÄĒ C1-C5 AS-IS ‚Üí TO-BE analysis
- `docs/plans/observability-langsmith-plan.md` ‚ÄĒ LangSmith integration plan
- `.claude/skills/geode-e2e/SKILL.md` ‚ÄĒ E2E testing skill guide

### Changed
- `ANALYST_TYPES`: hardcoded list ‚Üí `list(ANALYST_SPECIFIC.keys())` (1-line change)
- `AGENTIC_TOOLS`: module-level constant ‚Üí `get_agentic_tools(registry)` function
- `AgenticLoop.__init__()`: added `tool_registry`, `offline_mode` parameters
- `AgenticLoop._call_llm()`: added retry logic + token tracking
- `compile_graph()`: `interrupt_before` parameter wired from settings
- `ProfileStore` access: `.profiles` ‚Üí `.list_all()` (mypy fix)

### Fixed
- `ProfileStore.profiles` ‚Üí `ProfileStore.list_all()` attribute error
- Null-safe `model_dump()` in analyze handler (union-attr mypy error)
- Rate limit exhaustion: 3√ó retry with exponential backoff prevents transient failures

### Infrastructure
- Test count: 1879 ‚Üí 1909+ (30 new tests)
- Module count: 115 ‚Üí 116
- `langsmith` added as optional dependency

---

## [0.6.1] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-10

Content/code separation + infrastructure hardening. No new user-facing features.

### Changed
- Package structure: `src/geode/` ‚Üí `core/` (315 files removed, all imports updated)
- Prompt templates: Python strings ‚Üí 8 `.md` template files with `load_prompt()` loader
- Tool definitions: inline dicts ‚Üí `core/tools/definitions.json` (19 tools) + `tool_schemas.json` (11 schemas)
- Domain data: hardcoded axes/actions ‚Üí `evaluator_axes.yaml`, `cause_actions.yaml`
- Report templates: inline strings ‚Üí `core/extensibility/templates/` (HTML + 2 Markdown)
- Constants: hardcoded values ‚Üí `pydantic-settings` (`router_model`, `agreement_threshold`, etc.)
- `VALID_AXES_MAP` / `EVALUATOR_TYPES` derived from canonical YAML (SSOT)

### Fixed
- CI: `--cov=geode` ‚Üí `--cov=core`, 85 test files import path žąėž†ē
- Bandit B404/B602: `# nosec` for intentional subprocess in `bash_tool.py`
- 201 fixture JSON files: missing EOF newline

### Infrastructure
- Pre-commit hooks: ruff lint/format, mypy, bandit, standard hooks (local via `uv run`)
- `pre-commit` added as dev dependency
- Test count: 1823 ‚Üí 1879

---

## [0.6.0] ‚ÄĒ 2026-03-10

Initial release of GEODE ‚ÄĒ Undervalued IP Discovery Agent.
56 commits across 5 development phases.

### Added

#### Core Pipeline (LangGraph StateGraph)
- 7-node pipeline: `router ‚Üí signals ‚Üí analyst√ó4 ‚Üí evaluator√ó3 ‚Üí scoring ‚Üí verification ‚Üí synthesizer`
- LangGraph `Send()` API for parallel analyst/evaluator fan-out
- `GeodeState` (TypedDict) with Pydantic validation models
- `GeodeRuntime` ‚ÄĒ production wiring with dependency injection
- Streaming mode (`_execute_pipeline_streaming`) ‚ÄĒ progressive panel rendering

#### Analysis Engine
- 4 Analysts: `game_mechanics`, `player_experience`, `growth_potential`, `discovery`
- Clean Context anchoring prevention (no cross-analyst contamination)
- 3 Evaluators: `quality_judge`, `hidden_value`, `community_momentum`
- 14-Axis Rubric Scoring (PSM Engine)
- 6-weighted composite score √ó confidence multiplier ‚Üí Tier S/A/B/C classification

#### Verification Layer
- Guardrails G1‚ÄďG4 (score bounds, consistency, genre-fit, data quality)
- BiasBuster ‚ÄĒ 6-bias detection (anchoring, genre, recency, popularity, cultural, survivorship)
- Cross-LLM validation (agreement threshold ‚Č• 0.67)
- Rights Risk assessment (GAP-5)
- Cause Classification Decision Tree

#### CLI (Typer + Rich)
- Interactive REPL with dual routing: `/command` (deterministic) + free-text (NL Router)
- 16+ slash commands: `/analyze`, `/compare`, `/search`, `/batch`, `/report`, `/model`, `/status`, etc.
- NL Router ‚ÄĒ Claude Opus 4.6 Tool Use (12 tools, autonomous routing)
- 3-stage graceful degradation: LLM Tool Use ‚Üí offline pattern matching ‚Üí help fallback
- IP search engine with keyword/genre matching
- Report generation (HTML, JSON, Markdown √ó Summary/Detailed/Executive templates)
- Batch analysis with parallel execution and ranking table

#### Agentic Loop (v0.6.0-latest)
- `AgenticLoop` ‚ÄĒ `while(tool_use)` multi-round execution (max 10 rounds)
- `ConversationContext` ‚ÄĒ sliding-window multi-turn history (max 20 turns)
- `ToolExecutor` ‚ÄĒ 17 tool handlers with HITL safety gate
- `BashTool` ‚ÄĒ shell execution with 9 blocked dangerous patterns + user approval
- `SubAgentManager` ‚ÄĒ parallel task delegation via `IsolatedRunner` (MAX_CONCURRENT=5)
- Multi-intent support: sequential tool chaining by LLM decision
- Multi-turn context: pronoun resolution, follow-up queries

#### Memory System (3-Tier)
- Organization Memory (fixtures, immutable)
- Project Memory (`.claude/MEMORY.md`, persistent insights + rules)
- Session Memory (in-memory TTL, conversation context)
- Auto-learning loop: `PIPELINE_END` ‚Üí insight write-back to `MEMORY.md`
- Rule CRUD: create/update/delete/list analysis rules

#### Infrastructure (Hexagonal Architecture)
- `LLMClientPort` / `ClaudeAdapter` / `OpenAIAdapter` ‚ÄĒ multi-provider LLM
- `SignalEnrichmentPort` ‚ÄĒ market signal adapters
- Prompt caching (Anthropic cache_control)
- Ensemble mode: single / cross-LLM
- MCP Server (FastMCP: 6 tools, 2 resources)
- Auth profile management

#### Orchestration
- `HookSystem` ‚ÄĒ 23 lifecycle events (pipeline, node, analysis, verification, memory, prompt)
- `IsolatedRunner` ‚ÄĒ concurrent execution with timeout + semaphore (MAX_CONCURRENT=5)
- `TaskGraph` ‚ÄĒ DAG-based task dependency tracking
- `StuckDetector` ‚ÄĒ pipeline deadlock detection via hooks
- `LaneQueue` ‚ÄĒ concurrency control lanes
- `RunLog` ‚ÄĒ structured execution logging
- `PlanMode` ‚ÄĒ DRAFT ‚Üí APPROVED ‚Üí EXECUTING workflow

#### Tools & Policies
- `ToolRegistry` ‚ÄĒ 24 registered tools with lazy loading
- `PolicyChain` ‚ÄĒ composable tool access policies
- `NodeScopePolicy` ‚ÄĒ per-node tool allowlists
- Tool-augmented analyst paths with node-level retry

#### Automation (L4.5)
- Drift detection and monitoring
- Model registry with promotion lifecycle
- Confidence gating (feedback loop)
- Snapshot capture for reproducibility
- Trigger system (event-driven + cron-based)

### Fixed
- Scoring confidence calculation ‚ÄĒ empty/single/zero-mean edge cases (`7591445`)
- Evaluator fallback defaults `1.0 ‚Üí 3.0` neutral + CLI type safety (`76e4e30`)
- Session ID wiring into pipeline initial state ‚ÄĒ GAP-001 (`e8fbcfe`)
- Billing error detection with user-friendly message (`d878078`)
- Memory 6 issues from 3-agent quality audit (`4430fd4`)
- API key availability ‚Üí dry-run mode decision logic (`eeec586`, `8ea0555`)
- CI: bandit false positives, ruff format, mypy errors across 3 fix cycles

### Architecture
- Clean Architecture (Hexagonal) ‚ÄĒ ports/adapters separation
- 6-Layer hierarchy: Foundation ‚Üí Memory ‚Üí Agentic Core ‚Üí Orchestration ‚Üí Automation ‚Üí Extensibility
- `src/` layout migration (`bf2bc24`)
- OpenClaw-inspired patterns: Gateway, Session Key, Binding Router, Lane Queue

### Infrastructure
- CI: 5-job pipeline (lint, typecheck, test matrix 3.12/3.13, security, gate)
- Strict `mypy` type checking (zero errors)
- `ruff` linting with S-series security rules
- `bandit` security scanning
- 1,879 tests across 115 modules
- 8 Claude skills + 4 analyst sub-skills
- LangSmith tracing (conditional, via `_maybe_traceable`)
